tasks.title: Plan coverage for a target area
tasks.prompt: Using coverage-twin/poi data, propose site placements meeting a coverage target.

tasks.title: Balance demand vs cost
tasks.prompt: Choose the rollout option that best balances demand capture against deployment cost.

tasks.title: Forecast adoption & sequence
tasks.prompt: Predict adoption and recommend a deployment sequence maximizing early value.

tasks.title: DOIL intent for the rollout
tasks.prompt: Express the rollout plan as a DOIL intent with budget/coverage constraints.
